briefs.title: BC Employers Now Restricted From Requesting Sick Notes for Short Absences
briefs.summary: BC's new Employment Standards rules limit when employers can ask for a sick note. For absences of 5 consecutive days or fewer, employers cannot request one if the employee has taken only one similar leave earlier that calendar year.
briefs.action_required: Update your sick note policy to stop requesting notes for qualifying short absences under the new BC rules.

key_dates.label: BC sick note restriction rules take effect
